news.headline: England beat Spain 1-0 to lead Women’s World Cup 2027 qualifying group
news.summary: Hemp scores to give the Euro champions a crucial win as Keira Walsh leads in the absence of recovering Leah Williamson.

news.headline: Griezmann hopes to bid Atletico farewell in spectacular fashion
news.summary: Antoine Griezmann hopes to bid his beloved Atletico Madrid farewell in spectacular fashion after helping his team reach the first Champions League semi-finals in almost a decade. The record-breaking scorer is leaving the Spanish club at the end of this season to join Orlando City.

news.headline: Saudi Arabia pledges $3bn fresh deposit, extends $5bn facility through 2028
news.summary:
<p>Saudi Arabia has pledged an additional $3 billion in deposits for Pakistan and has extended its existing $5bn facility for a further three years, Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb announced in Washington.</p>
